name: The Golf Den
address: 8 E Front St, Red Bank, NJ 07701
about: The Golf Den is an indoor golf lounge located in Red Bank, New Jersey, offering year-round golfing practice and events with state-of-the-art TrackMan 4 simulators. The facility provides a modern and inviting atmosphere with multiple bays equipped for playing on over 100 courses worldwide, alongside amenities like TVs and refrigerators in each bay. It caters to golfers of all skill levels, from beginners to those looking to sharpen their game, and also hosts private events ranging from corporate gatherings to birthdays, with options to bring your own food and beverages.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan 4 technology provides precise data tracking for all aspects of the game
Year-round indoor practice and play regardless of weather conditions
Flexible booking with hourly bay rentals and no need to play a full course
Ability to host private events with customizable food and drink options

food_and_drink.notes: Guests can bring their own food to stock the bay's refrigerator
BYOB is permitted; guests can bring their own beer and wine

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor used in all bays, tracking every detail of the game

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to contact The Golf Den directly for details on equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, guests are welcome to bring their own food and drinks, including beer and wine, and can stock the fridge in their bay.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The average player can finish a round in about an hour, though time can be used flexibly without needing to play a full course.

faq.question: Is The Golf Den kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families and can host events like birthdays, making it kid-friendly.
